# In the Shadows

> [!note] 📖 Event · Cost: **3** · Lore

![[144012.png]]

---

Lower the cost to play In the Shadows by 1 for each **_Hobbit_** or **_Ranger_** hero you control.
**Combat Action:** Each enemy engaged with you with engagement cost higher than your threat gets -1 ATK and -1 DEF until the end of the phase.

---
